text: The first scene feels serene yet slightly disorienting because of the sideways perspective. The emptiness and soft beanbags invite me to pause and rest, but the unnatural tilt makes me question my grounding—as if the world itself is gently nudging me to see differently. In the second image, surrounded by vibrant colors and stimulating words, I feel intellectually awakened. The wall about research and development, along with the digital exhibits, makes me ponder our coexistence with machines. Here, curiosity stirs—I'm eager to explore new connections between human thought and technology.
